steps.title: Compare the shifted sets
steps.content: The first five values in data set B are each $1$ greater than the first five values in data set A. If $h=28$, then every value in B is the corresponding value in A plus $1$, so the standard deviations are equal.

steps.title: Test the possible values
steps.content: Using population standard deviation, the values are about $6.47$, $5.15$, $6.47$, and $6.77$ for data set A, B when $h=23$, B when $h=28$, and B when $h=29$, respectively. Only I makes data set B have a smaller standard deviation than data set A. The answer is A.
